title: alcea rosea var. sinensis
intro: Alcea rosea var. sinensis, also known as Chinese hollyhock or hollyhock root, is a plant-based remedy derived from the root of the Alcea rosea plant, native to China and used in traditional medicine for centuries. The medicinal properties of Alcea rosea var. sinensis include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which contribute to its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. This plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive problems, fever, and skin disorders, and is also believed to possess antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. Alcea rosea var. sinensis can be prepared as a decoction, powder, or capsule, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy for those seeking natural health benefits.
